mapper.select: select * from agent_session_state where conversation_id=#{conversationId} for update
mapper.insert: insert into agent_session_state(conversation_id, state_version, active_goal, current_domain, conversation_summary, last_dataset_id, last_artifact_id, last_file_id, pending_action_json, context_json, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values(#{conversationId}, #{stateVersion}, #{activeGoal}, #{currentDomain}, #{conversationSummary}, #{lastDatasetId}, #{lastArtifactId}, #{lastFileId}, #{pendingActionJson}, #{contextJson}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update agent_session_state set state_version=state_version+1, active_goal=#{activeGoal}, current_domain=#{currentDomain}, conversation_summary=#{conversationSummary}, last_dataset_id=#{lastDatasetId}, last_artifact_id=#{lastArtifactId}, last_file_id=#{lastFileId}, pending_action_json=#{pendingActionJson}, context_json=#{contextJson}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where conversation_id=#{conversationId} and state_version=#{stateVersion}
